title: EAFIX Unified Atomic Module Manifest Schema
description: Unified module-centric schema that replaces permanent submodule/work-cell architectural layers. Each record is the authoritative manifest/context packet for one atomic canonical module: identity, process binding, contracts, file ownership, service/runtime binding, communication channels, standards/gates, state/failure behavior, documentation, migration traceability, reconciliation status, AI guidance, platform constraints, and staleness policy.
